title: Community Clinic
tagline: A community health facility offering free treatment and medication to everyone who walks through our doors.
intro_p1: Access to basic healthcare should not be a privilege. UCDP's Community Clinic is a small but vital health facility serving the Manyatta community and surrounding areas — treating common and simple illnesses, providing essential medication, and referring more serious cases to partner facilities equipped to handle them.
intro_p2: All treatment is completely free of charge for everyone who visits — no consultation fees, no payment required from anyone.
intro_p3: The clinic also houses a pharmacy, and all patients who receive treatment are given their medication free of charge — removing the common barrier where patients are diagnosed but cannot afford to buy the drugs they need.

impact_cards.label: All Treated Patients Get Medication Free

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: Patients walk in and are seen by our health workers. Children under 18 are treated at no charge whatsoever.

steps.title: Treatment
steps.text: Simple and common illnesses are diagnosed and treated on-site by our trained health staff.

steps.title: Free Medication
steps.text: All patients who receive treatment are given their prescribed medication free of charge from our on-site pharmacy.

steps.title: Referrals
steps.text: Cases beyond our facility's capacity are referred to partner hospitals, with our team supporting families through the process.
